Detailed Plan Comparison

Everything you need to know about what's included in each tier.

FeatureBasicPremiumInstitutional
Max Beneficiaries1Up to 5Unlimited
On-Chain HeartbeatsUser Pays Gas (L1)Gasless (L2 Relayed)Custom Dedicated Relayer
IPFS Storage Limit50 MB5 GB (Priority Pinning)100 GB+
Shamir Key ShardsStandard (3-of-5)Advanced (Custom m-of-n)Enterprise Grade
Smart Contract TypeShared ProtocolShared ProtocolDedicated Isolated Contract

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I pay gas fees?

For Basic vaults, users cover L1 network gas for heartbeats. Premium users enjoy gasless heartbeats via our L2 relayer network, paid for by your subscription.

Can I upgrade later?

Yes, you can upgrade your vault tier at any time. The transition is seamless and won't require you to re-verify your beneficiaries.

Which tokens are accepted?

We currently accept USDC, USDT, and DAI for subscription payments across all supported EVM chains.

How secure is the protocol?

DeadMan is fully audited by top security firms. All logic is on-chain, and we do not have access to your private keys or vault contents.
